speakers.name: Suneeta Reddy
direct_answers: Yes, we are operationalizing around 700 beds this year.
speakers.summary: Suneeta Reddy opened the call with a confident overview of Apollo Hospitals' strong start to FY26, highlighting double-digit growth across all verticals. She detailed the financial performance, noting a 15% increase in consolidated revenue and significant growth in both the Healthcare Services and Apollo HealthCo sectors. Reddy emphasized the strategic focus on expanding hospital capacity and achieving digital business break-even by the fiscal year's end. Her tone was optimistic, reflecting confidence in the company's growth trajectory and strategic initiatives.

speakers.name: A. Krishnan
direct_answers: That is correct. You know, you are right in your understanding.
speakers.summary: A. Krishnan provided a neutral and factual overview of the financial metrics, including a marginal dip in EBITDA margins and expectations for future growth. He confirmed the strategic reorganization involving Apollo HealthCo and addressed questions regarding international market strategies. Krishnan's responses were clear and direct, focusing on financial details and strategic plans without expressing strong emotions or opinions.

speakers.name: Dr. Madhu Sasidhar
speakers.role: President and CEO of the Hospitals Division
speakers.summary: Dr. Madhu Sasidhar discussed the hospital division's operations with confidence, focusing on the growth drivers for average revenue per patient, which include case mix and pricing strategies. He provided insights into the patient mix, highlighting the impact of international patients and the strategic focus on high-complexity care. His tone was assured, reflecting a deep understanding of the hospital operations and strategic priorities.

speakers.name: Madhivanan Balakrishnan
speakers.summary: Madhivanan Balakrishnan spoke confidently about Apollo HealthCo's digital business, emphasizing improvements in unit economics and the path to break-even. He addressed competition in the digital pharmacy space, expressing confidence in Apollo's strong market position and sustainable business model. Balakrishnan highlighted the strategic focus on customer acquisition and retention, projecting a positive outlook for the digital business's growth and profitability.

speakers.name: Sriram Iyer
speakers.summary: Sriram Iyer provided a neutral overview of AHLL's performance, focusing on the growth in diagnostics and primary care. He discussed the impact of opening a new Central Reference Laboratory in Chennai and its effect on EBITDA margins. Iyer's tone was factual and focused on operational details, highlighting the strategic initiatives to enhance diagnostic capabilities and improve margins in the coming quarters.

speakers.name: Sanjiv Gupta
speakers.summary: Sanjiv Gupta discussed Apollo HealthCo's financial performance with a neutral tone, highlighting a significant improvement in margins due to renegotiated rates with service providers. He provided insights into the revenue growth and the strategic focus on enhancing profitability across diagnostics and healthcare services. Gupta's responses were clear and focused on financial metrics, reflecting a detailed understanding of the company's financial strategies.

speakers.name: Obul Reddy
speakers.summary: Obul Reddy provided a neutral overview of the pharmacy business's strategic focus on geographical expansion, particularly in the Central and Southern regions. He discussed the plans for store expansion and the expected revenue growth from these initiatives. Reddy's tone was factual, emphasizing the strategic priorities for expanding the pharmacy network and enhancing revenue streams.
